common.tagline: One platform for modern dental clinics

landing.heroSubtitle: Appointments, interactive dental charts, patient records, HMO billing and digital payments — all in one place. Built for practices from single-chair studios to multi-branch groups.
landing.heroMockupAlt: DentQL clinic software on tablet and phone in a modern dental office
landing.featuresSubtitle: From the front desk to the chair, DentEase replaces your paper ledger, spreadsheets and scattered tools.
landing.f1Desc: Drag-and-drop calendar, conflict detection and SMS reminders via Semaphore.
landing.f2Desc: 32-tooth FDI odontogram with 5 surfaces, condition history and audit trail per dentist.
landing.f3Desc: Medical history, allergies, PhilHealth #, X-rays and consent forms in one place.
landing.f4Desc: Auto-invoice, GCash / Maya / card via PayMongo, HMO claim status tracking.
landing.f5Desc: Anesthetic, filling, consumables — low-stock alerts and restock logs.
landing.f6Desc: Daily revenue, dentist performance, no-show rate, top procedures.
landing.howTitle: Set up in a single afternoon.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up as admin, invite your dentists and front desk staff.
landing.step2Desc: Add existing patients or bulk import from spreadsheet.
landing.step3Desc: Book appointments, chart teeth, issue invoices from day one.
landing.ctaSubtitle: No credit card to try. Sign in with your staff account to get started.
landing.footerTagline: Illuminate your practice with the next generation of dental intelligence.
landing.footerProductIntro: Explore the platform, compare plans, and jump into the tools your team uses every day.
landing.footerCompanyIntro: We work with clinics from first rollout through day‑to‑day support — reach out for demos, pricing, or partnerships.
landing.footerLegalIntro: How we collect, use, and protect data — plus the terms that govern the service. Ask us if you need a DPA or vendor list.
landing.localTitle: Adapted to your local healthcare landscape.
landing.local1: Privacy-by-design, aligned with local data protection laws
landing.local2: Health insurance number and e-Claim fields out of the box
landing.diffTitle: Dentist + PH differentiators that stand out
landing.diffSubtitle: Practical, clinic-floor features that create clear competitive advantage.
landing.diff1Desc: Dentists chart, plan, and document in one tablet flow while at the chair.
landing.diff2Desc: Allergies, medical history, forms, and X-rays are instantly available in one profile.
landing.diff3Desc: Faster collections with payment methods patients in the Philippines already trust.
landing.diff4Desc: Track and reconcile Maxicare, Intellicare, and Medicard in a single control panel.
landing.diff5Desc: See who is next, where each patient is seated, and overdue actions at a glance.
landing.diff6Desc: PhilHealth fields, Manila time alignment, and local reporting workflows out of the box.
landing.testiTitle: Software written in the language of clinics.
landing.testi1Quote: No more paper charts. My assistant fills the tooth condition on the tablet and I see it instantly on my dashboard.
landing.testi2Quote: We track HMO claims from one screen. We always know where each one stands.
landing.testi3Quote: Patients book online and pay with GCash. The front desk phone rings a lot less.
landing.testi4Quote: I chart on the tablet and invoice from the same screen — without leaving the chair.
landing.testi5Quote: SMS reminders go out reliably. Patients don't forget appointments anymore.
landing.testi6Quote: Calendar, HMO, invoicing, stock — one place. Our spreadsheets are finally closed.
landing.testi7Quote: Moving patient data across branches is no longer an issue. Every branch works on the same record.
landing.testi8Quote: Payment link arrives, I pay with GCash, invoice lands in my email. Simple flow.
landing.testi9Quote: My team uses Filipino on the floor while I run admin in Turkish. Same data, our languages.
landing.testi10Quote: Clear, well thought-out, with PhilHealth fields where they should be — exactly what I was looking for.
landing.capSubtitle: From bookings to x-rays, HMO to inventory — your entire daily workflow in one platform.
landing.capCloud: Same data on every device, every branch
landing.cap1Desc: History, allergies and PhilHealth info on phone, tablet or desktop.
landing.cap2Desc: Branches stay in sync; dentists, front desk and owners share one dataset.
landing.cap3Desc: Auto invoices, HMO coverage, GCash / Maya / card — all on one screen.
landing.cap4Desc: Drag-and-drop calendar, conflict detection, SMS reminders.
landing.cap5Desc: FDI odontogram, 5 surfaces, history and dentist-level audit trail.
landing.cap6Desc: Min-stock thresholds, movement logs, low-stock alerts.
landing.personasTitle: Built for every role in your clinic.
landing.personasSubtitle: From owner to receptionist, dentist to patient — each workflow is thought through separately.
landing.persona1Desc: Revenue, team and branch performance in one place.
landing.persona1B1: Daily revenue and dentist performance reports
landing.persona1B3: HMO claim status and payment flow
landing.persona2Desc: Whole workflow without leaving the chair.
landing.persona2B2: One-tap access to history, allergies and X-rays
landing.persona2B3: Treatment plans and notes, tracked session by session
landing.persona3Desc: Appointment flow that keeps the phone quiet.
landing.persona3B3: Invoicing, HMO forms and payment collection
landing.persona4B2: Pay with GCash, get invoice via email
landing.persona4B3: See past treatments and your next visit
landing.faqSubtitle: The most common questions. If yours isn't here, reach out from the contact section.
landing.faqContact: Want to send us a question?
landing.faq1A: In a cloud database with access control and audit logs, developed with Data Privacy Act (RA 10173) principles in mind.
landing.faq2Q: Can I import my existing Excel / Sheets patients?
landing.faq2A: Yes. Bulk import from CSV is supported with a mapping screen for patient, dentist and procedure fields.
landing.faq3A: DentQL is cloud-based and needs internet for live data. We are exploring offline-friendly workflows for a future release.
landing.faq4A: GCash, Maya, PayMongo (cards) and cash. Invoices are delivered via email or SMS.
landing.faq5Q: We have multiple branches — does it fit?
landing.faq5A: Yes. Patient and stock data is shared across branches; dentist assignment and permissions are per-branch.
landing.faq6A: Ready as soon as you register as admin. Inviting your team, importing patients and opening the first appointment takes a few hours, not days.
landing.newsletterSubtitle: Join the free demo list. No credit card required.
landing.f1Long: A drag-and-drop calendar with real-time conflict detection, recurring appointments, waitlists and bulk SMS reminders — built for walk-ins and high-volume practices.
landing.f2Long: Full FDI/ISO 32-tooth odontogram with 5 surfaces per tooth, condition history, treatment notes and per-dentist audit trail. Works on tablet while at the chair.
landing.f3Long: Centralise medical history, allergies, PhilHealth number, consent forms and X-rays. Quickly switch between overview, visit history, allergies and imaging.
landing.f4Long: Auto-generated invoices with HMO coverage math done for you. Accept GCash, Maya, card (PayMongo) or cash. Track HMO claim status across providers in one place.
landing.f5Long: Track anesthetics, fillings and consumables with smart min-stock thresholds. One-tap reorder, movement logs and low-stock push notifications.
landing.featureOpenInApp: Open this screen in the app
landing.featureOpenInAppHint: You may be asked to sign in first.

demo.tapTooth: Tap a tooth to cycle its status

landing.daySubtitle: A Monday at your clinic — see which screen meets you at each hour.
landing.day1Title: Open the door, glance at the board
landing.day1Desc: Your day summarised — how many bookings, new patients and pending HMO, at a glance.
landing.day2Desc: Type the name — history, allergies and PhilHealth info appear. No folders to flip.
landing.day3Desc: Mark the tooth on the tablet; your assistant sees the new procedure in the plan instantly.
landing.day4Desc: Invoice out, coverage calculated for you, claim sent to the provider.
landing.day5Desc: Sterile gloves are critical; add a reorder note in one tap.
landing.dayMockMedNotesText: Hypertension (Losartan 50 mg). Coordinate with anesthetist before surgery.
landing.day6Desc: Revenue, no-shows, HMO summary, tomorrow's bookings — all ready at close.
landing.deviceTitle: One source of truth. Every device. Every branch.
landing.deviceSubtitle: Patients check on their phone, dentists use tablets at the chair, owners manage from desktop — always in sync.
landing.deviceMobileDesc: Book, pay and see history — without coming to the clinic.
landing.deviceTabletDesc: Odontogram, treatment plan and X-rays — within reach at the chair.
landing.deviceDesktopDesc: Revenue, staff performance, multi-branch reports — detailed panel.
landing.secSubtitle: Clinic data is your responsibility. DentEase is built to carry that responsibility with you.
landing.secPromise: We name the exact measures we take. No exaggerated certification claims — only the work that was done.
landing.sec1Desc: RA 10173 principles are honored when collecting, storing and transmitting data.
landing.sec2Desc: Dentist, receptionist, admin — each role sees only what they need.
landing.sec3Desc: Who changed what, when — every action is timestamped.
landing.sec4Desc: HTTPS end-to-end between browser and server.
landing.sec5Desc: The database is backed up on a regular schedule with a disaster-recovery plan.
landing.sec6Desc: Auto-logout on inactivity; detach a lost device remotely.
landing.pricingTitle: Simple to start, scales as you grow.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Free during beta. Final prices will be set together with the first 50 clinics.
landing.pricingFinePrint: No credit card during beta. We'll give 30 days notice before final pricing.
landing.quoteBandSubtitle: Leave your details — we’ll follow up with setup options, training, and rollout guidance for your team.
landing.quoteBandPricingHint: Full comparison also lives on the pricing page.
landing.quotePrivacy: By sending, you agree we may email you about DentEase. See our privacy policy.
landing.quotePlanBlurbStarter: Single location, full feature access during beta.
landing.plan1Desc: All features open for small clinics.
landing.plan3Desc: Shared data, permissions and reporting across branches.
landing.plan3F2: Shared patients and stock across branches
landing.baTitle: From paper to screen in one leap.
landing.baSubtitle: See the old clinic setup next to the flow DentEase brings.
landing.ba1Before: Paper charts, flipping through patient folders
landing.ba3Before: HMO claims, 3–5 days of phone chasing
landing.ba4Before: Stock runs out before anyone notices
landing.chipTitle: 28+ details for your clinic, ready out of the box.
landing.chipSubtitle: No extra fees, no add-ons, no installation.
landing.chipFoot: The list keeps growing — whatever clinic teams ask for gets added.
landing.testimonialsSample: Sample scenarios for illustration — not real patients
Sample scenarios for illustration — not real patients
landing.chip_chart_desc: Interactive 32-tooth FDI odontogram that works on any device. Track decay, fillings, and RCT with precision.
landing.chip_appointments_desc: A smart drag-and-drop calendar with real-time conflict detection and automated SMS reminders.
landing.chip_inventory_desc: Track anesthetics and consumables with critical stock alerts and one-tap reordering logs.
landing.chip_billing_desc: Philippines-ready billing with auto-invoicing, HMO coverage calculation, and GCash payments.
landing.chip_xray_desc: High-resolution dental imaging storage, instantly accessible from any patient profile.
landing.chip_reports_desc: Daily revenue, performance tracking, and clinic health analytics in one dashboard.
landing.chip_odontogram_desc: Professional FDI-standard charting with 5-surface precision for all dental procedures.
landing.chip_drag_desc: Seamlessly move appointments across chairs with instant sync across all clinic devices.
landing.chip_audit_desc: Full accountability with a transparent log of who changed what and when.
landing.chip_roles_desc: Granular permissions for dentists, receptionists, and owners for data security.
landing.chip_dark_desc: Beautiful, eye-friendly dark mode for late-night charting or surgery use.
landing.chip_lang_desc: Full support for English, Filipino (PH), and Turkish for your entire team.
landing.chip_gcash_desc: Collect payments instantly via GCash, the most trusted wallet in the PH.
landing.chip_maya_desc: Integration with Maya for secure, secure digital payments directly from invoices.
landing.chip_paymongo_desc: Accept credit and debit cards securely via the local PayMongo gateway.
landing.chip_philhealth_desc: Pre-filled PhilHealth fields and e-Claims to speed up medical reporting.
landing.chip_stock_desc: Never run out of supplies with automated low-stock push notifications.
landing.chip_sms_desc: Reduce no-shows with automated appointment reminders sent to patients.
landing.chip_pdf_desc: Professional, BIR-aligned invoice PDFs ready to print or email.
landing.chip_selfbook_desc: Let patients book their own slots online, saving your front desk hours.
landing.chip_conflict_desc: Intelligent system that prevents double-booking and dentist overlap.
landing.chip_waitlist_desc: Fill cancelled slots by notifying patients on the digital waitlist.
landing.chip_history_desc: Complete timeline of patient permissions, consent forms, and medical updates.
landing.chip_register_desc: Empower patients to fill their medical history before their first visit.
landing.chip_kbd_desc: Lightning-fast navigation with keyboard shortcuts for busy receptionists.
landing.chip_tz_desc: Native support for Manila time and local Philippine holidays.
landing.chip_php_desc: Full support for Philippine Peso with BIR-compliant math.
landing.newsletterStep2: Check your inbox — link arrives in 2 minutes.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your clinic dashboard.
auth.loginHeroTitle: Run the clinic without juggling a dozen tools.
auth.loginHeroSub: Appointments, charts, billing, and HMO — one calm dashboard for dentists and the front desk.
auth.loginHeroPoint1: Role-based access for dentists, reception, and admins
auth.loginHeroPoint2: Philippines-ready billing, discounts, and HMO tracking
auth.loginHeroPoint3: Patient portal with OTP — fewer “did you get my forms?” calls
auth.loginHeroFoot: Encrypted in transit · Built for busy clinics
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your staff email and we will send reset instructions.
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists for this email, check your inbox for a reset link.
auth.forgotFailed: Could not send reset email. Try again later.
auth.resetInvalidLink: This reset link is invalid or expired.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in…
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

registerClinic.testimonial: The setup was seamless. We were booking patients and generating BIR-compliant invoices by the second day.
registerClinic.formSub: Step into the future of dental practice management.
registerClinic.termsPrefix: By signing up, you agree to our

kiosk.patientDesc: Access your history, prescriptions, and schedule appointments online.
kiosk.staffDesc: Restricted to authorized clinic staff and medical practitioners.
kiosk.intakeDesc: Update your information, medical history, and sign consent forms before your visit.
